2603.09947.title: The Confidence Gate Theorem: When Should Ranked Decision Systems Abstain?
2603.09947.paper_summary: Ranked decision systems -- recommenders, ad auctions, clinical triage queues -- must decide when to intervene in ranked outputs and when to abstain. We study when confidence-based abstention monotonically improves decision quality, and when it fails. The formal conditions are simple: rank-alignment and no inversion zones. The substantive contribution is identifying why these conditions hold or fail: the distinction between structural uncertainty (missing data, e.g., cold-start) and contextual uncertainty (missing context, e.g., temporal drift). Empirically, we validate this distinction across three domains: collaborative filtering (MovieLens, 3 distribution shifts), e-commerce intent detection (RetailRocket, Criteo, Yoochoose), and clinical pathway triage (MIMIC-IV). Structural uncertainty produces near-monotonic abstention gains in all domains; structurally grounded confidence signals (observation counts) fail under contextual drift, producing as many monotonicity violations as random abstention on our MovieLens temporal split. Context-aware alternatives -- ensemble disagreement and recency features -- substantially narrow the gap (reducing violations from 3 to 1--2) but do not fully restore monotonicity, suggesting that contextual uncertainty poses qualitatively different challenges. Exception labels defined from residuals degrade substantially under distribution shift (AUC drops from 0.71 to 0.61--0.62 across three splits), providing a clean negative result against the common practice of exception-based intervention. The results provide a practical deployment diagnostic: check C1 and C2 on held-out data before deploying a confidence gate, and match the confidence signal to the dominant uncertainty type.
2603.09947.paper_summary_zh: 排名決策系統 -- 推薦系統、廣告拍賣、臨床分診隊列 -- 必須決定何時介入排名輸出，何時選擇不介入。<lb/>我們研究基於信心的放棄何時會單調改善決策質量，以及何時會失敗。<lb/>正式條件很簡單：排名對齊和無反轉區域。<lb/>實質性貢獻在於識別這些條件為何成立或失敗：結構性不確定性（缺失數據，例如冷啟動）與上下文不確定性（缺失上下文，例如時間漂移）之間的區別。<lb/>在實證上，我們在三個領域驗證了這一區別：協同過濾（MovieLens，3種分佈變化）、電子商務意圖檢測（RetailRocket，Criteo，Yoochoose）和臨床路徑分診（MIMIC-IV）。<lb/>結構性不確定性在所有領域中產生近乎單調的放棄收益；在上下文漂移下，基於結構的信心信號（觀察計數）失敗，導致我們的MovieLens時間分割中出現與隨機放棄一樣多的單調性違規。<lb/>基於上下文的替代方案 -- 集成不一致性和近期特徵 -- 顯著縮小了差距（將違規從3減少到1--2），但未能完全恢復單調性，這表明上下文不確定性帶來了質量不同的挑戰。<lb/>從殘差定義的例外標籤在分佈變化下顯著降級（AUC從0.71降至0.61--0.62，跨越三個分割），提供了一個針對基於例外的介入常見做法的清晰負面結果。<lb/>這些結果提供了一個實用的部署診斷：在部署信心閘門之前，檢查C1和C2在保留數據上的表現，並將信心信號與主導的不確定性類型相匹配。
2603.09947.author: Ronald Doku et.al.
